# OpenCode parser fixtures (synthetic)

## legacy-json/

| File | Purpose | Expected behavior |
|------|---------|-------------------|
| `valid.json` | legacy message JSON | 1 session, exact tokens |
| `missing-fields.json` | message without usage | unavailable usage |
| `corrupt.json` | invalid JSON | error warning |

## sqlite/

| File | Purpose | Expected behavior |
|------|---------|-------------------|
| `valid.db` | session/message tables | 1+ sessions from SQLite rows |
| `missing-fields.db` | messages without token columns | metadata-only / unavailable |
| `corrupt.db` | not a valid sqlite file | error warning |

Generated by `packages/parsers/tests/fixtures/generate-sqlite-fixtures.mjs`.
